data.body: DONE (session end). Landed on main via Gerrit 249/253/256/259 (all through the LLM-Review + Verified gates): classes A/B/C level-triggered heals (binding_walk.py) + Phase-1 baseline dual-write shadow (baseline_shadow.py) + rollback doc. Tickets 444d, 13eb, 5854 CLOSED with completion-verifier attestations (5854 needed a literal both-snapshots-unbound adopt test to satisfy its AC). 7d23 + epic file-lens-jewel remain in_progress: the consumer-swap flip and the live-pass operational validation (>=10 clean live passes ~3.5h + capped live heal of REB-464/456/465/466/457/530/532) require live production Jira and cannot run in an agent session. Full reconciler suite (1134) green on main.
